steps.title: Follow cause and effect
steps.content: The speed difference is explained by the fact that flight-related features limit top speed less than land-running features. The blank must name the speed difference as an effect of that fact.

steps.title: Reject wrong relationships
steps.content: B makes the difference a goal, C makes it a rejection, and D reverses the logic by making the speed difference explain the physical features. The answer is A.
